openFindings.title: Root packet lineage still points at the pre-renumbering parent in canonical docs
openFindings.description: The root packet still declares the old 010 parent while graph-metadata resolves the packet under the current 001 lineage.

openFindings.title: Packet closeout surfaces overstate root refresh completion
openFindings.description: Checklist and implementation-summary claims still say the root packet was refreshed even though stale lineage remains in the root docs.

openFindings.title: Documented 16-entity cap drifts from live parser behavior
openFindings.description: The packet documents a 16-entity ceiling, but the parser currently slices derived entities to 24.

openFindings.title: Documented derived-field caps are not enforced by the schema validator
openFindings.description: The packet documents hard caps for multiple derived arrays, but the schema accepts unbounded arrays for those fields.

openFindings.title: Level-3 root packet is missing the required decision record surface
openFindings.description: The root packet declares level 3 but does not provide decision-record.md, weakening recoverable rationale.

openFindings.title: Derived key_files still store the same parser file under mixed path formats
openFindings.description: The root packet still carries non-canonical duplicate references for the same parser file in derived key_files.

openFindings.title: Derived entity list still contains low-signal heading fragments
openFindings.description: Low-signal fragments such as "Background Every" and "Should Fix" still survive into derived entities.
